message:
fix(runtime): use try_with for all thread-local guard drops to prevent panics during thread shutdown

Same pattern as the earlier observability/context.rs fix, applied to four
more thread-local guard Drop impls that used .with() instead of .try_with():

- cx/cx.rs: CurrentCxGuard — restores previous Cx on drop
- runtime/builder.rs: ScopedRuntimeHandle — restores previous runtime handle
- runtime/scheduler/local_queue.rs: CurrentQueueGuard — restores previous queue
- runtime/sharded_state.rs: lock_order::unlock_n — pops LIFO lock records

All four could panic if their thread-local was already destroyed during
thread shutdown. Now silently skip the cleanup via let _ = try_with(),
matching the established pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
